ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of spiritual practices */,
  "at_least_once_a_week" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing at least once a week */,
  "once_or_twice_a_month" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing once or twice a month */,
  "several_times_a_year" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing several times a year */,
  "seldom_never" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing seldom or never */,
  "dont_know" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who don't know */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or context provided by the respondent */,
  "overall_wellbeing_score" REAL /* Overall wellbeing score of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., at least once a week, once or twice a month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "spiritual_affiliation" TEXT /* Spiritual affiliation of the respondent */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_demographics" (
  "response_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response-demographic link */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_demographics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of spiritual practices */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend was observed */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the trend was observed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the trend was observed in */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of spiritual practices */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the recommendation */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the frequency of spiritual practices
Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing at least once a week
Percentage of respondents who feel spiritual peace and wellbeing once or twice a month
